shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'pwd && rg -n "getItemProps|preventDownshiftDefault|onMouseDown|useCombobox" src test* __tests__ 2>/dev/null | head -240 && git status --short'

/bin/bash -lc 'git diff --check && git diff -- src/hooks/useCombobox/index.js src/hooks/useCombobox/__tests__/getItemProps.test.js && git status --short'
